purpose: Machine-readable contract for the MAS/OPL stage-route reconcile handshake, currentness precedence, and anti-loop budget.
machine_boundary: This contract defines route/currentness/reconcile rules. It does not declare study truth, paper closure, publication readiness, submission readiness, quality verdicts, artifact mutation authority, current_package freshness, or production readiness.

external_engineering_principles.purpose: Map mature distributed workflow, idempotency, read-model, and reliability practice to MAS/OPL stage-route currentness rules.

source_refs.label: Temporal Event History / Workflow replay
source_refs.mapped_rule: durable execution history is execution evidence, not MAS domain acceptance

source_refs.label: Temporal Activity idempotency
source_refs.mapped_rule: provider activity retries require stable idempotency identity

source_refs.label: AWS idempotent APIs / client token
source_refs.mapped_rule: caller intent identity must be explicit before safe retry or redrive

source_refs.label: Azure CQRS / read-model lag
source_refs.mapped_rule: read models can lag and must expose evidence status instead of claiming source truth

source_refs.label: Google SRE overload / retry budget
source_refs.mapped_rule: automatic retry needs a bounded budget and an actionable stop condition

applies_to: study_progress current owner action projection reconcile

transition_authority.ProviderAdmissionRequested: MAS provider admission identity bound to current owner delta
transition_authority.ProviderRunning: OPL liveness plus MAS identity match and no terminal closeout
transition_authority.MASCloseoutConsumed: domain-health-diagnostic apply or equivalent MAS authority consumer
transition_authority.DomainAcceptedOrTypedBlocked: MAS owner receipt, quality gate receipt, stable typed blocker, human gate, or route-back evidence

stage_route_call_graph.purpose: Machine-readable graph for the MAS/OPL stage-route invocation path, authority direction, and same-identity loop guards.

nodes.label: strict provider running proof
nodes.authority: OPL liveness plus MAS identity match

nodes.label: MAS owner receipt or stable typed blocker

edges.loop_guard: current owner identity is the only ordinary planning root
read-model projection cannot create a new desired owner
terminal event closes running projection for same identity

forbidden_edges.reason: observability refs cannot generate desired owner state
transport status cannot become canonical current work unit
typed blocker cannot self-authorize provider admission or readiness execution
provider completion is not MAS domain acceptance
stale dispatch cannot bypass selected-dispatch currentness

required_sequence: terminal closeout packet exists for the same stage attempt or work-unit identity
MAS consumes closeout through domain-health-diagnostic apply or equivalent authority consumer
if provider_admission_pending remains for a new identity, OPL scoped tick/hydrate may start the next attempt
if the same identity remains pending, classify as closeout consumption/currentness bug

progress_resets_budget_when_any_present: stable TypedBlocker with new blocker identity
reviewer/auditor record ref for current artifact digest

stage_route_arbiter_surface.purpose: Explain, in one machine-readable place, why each provider-admission identity is retained as pending or suppressed by strict live/terminal evidence.

already_supported: StageRun launch and closeout admission boundary
route reconciler as transport-only owner-route hydrator

opl_covered_and_mas_consumes.required_effect: identity-matched terminal typed closeout or owner receipt suppresses stale running/live projection in current_owner_delta, evidence worklist, queue projection, and workbench drilldown
opl_covered_and_mas_consumes.same_identity_queue_effect: a running queue row linked to a terminal provider attempt is repaired to stale transport closeout observed / idempotent noop, with lease cleared and no duplicate hydrate or provider attempt
opl_covered_and_mas_consumes.identity_different_successor_effect: terminal evidence stays attached as precedence evidence while MAS keeps the new current owner action or provider admission pending

opl_covered_and_mas_consumes.required_effect: all launch, liveness, closeout, owner-answer, and replay decisions compare the same packet; MAS provider_admission_identity and route/attempt idempotency keys are embedded verbatim instead of re-derived from OPL labels
lineage budget, repeat thresholds, reset conditions, typed-blocker escalation, and automatic-redrive stop are schema-backed and regression-tested

terminal closeout missing required user-stage-log domain fields is consumed as domain_closeout_provided_incomplete_user_stage_log typed blocker, receives no paper-progress credit, and cannot trigger automatic redrive
worker_source_stale remains fail-closed, but operator-facing status exposes supervisor-safe restart only when Temporal is reachable, attempt ledger is readable, and no active attempt exists
current_owner_delta, StageRun, attempt ledger, Temporal workflow, ToolResultEnvelope, and owner answer share refs-only trace/span context without entering ordinary planning or domain authority

runtime_supervision_operator_policy.purpose: Central operator contract for deciding whether a MAS/OPL stage-route surface is only observable, needs closeout consumption, may hydrate a new OPL StageRun, or must fail closed as supervisor diagnostic.

current_control_four_state_payload.running: OPL StageRun lease plus Temporal/provider liveness with same identity
current_control_four_state_payload.terminal: OPL/default-executor closeout refs and terminal outcome for same identity
current_control_four_state_payload.read_model: rebuildable projection and operator summary only

kubernetes_controller.adopt: desired/current/status reconcile; current_owner_delta is desired state and read-models are status
kubernetes_controller.reject: status, queue, or worklist deriving domain truth

temporal.adopt: durable retry with idempotent activities and attempt history
temporal.reject: provider completion counting as MAS domain acceptance

argo_workflows.adopt: retry policy, exit-handler-style closeout hooks, workflow archive refs, and bounded synchronization for transport execution
argo_workflows.reject: workflow archive, memoized step result, or retry success replacing MAS owner receipt, typed blocker, or evidence body

airflow.adopt: task metadata and XCom-like small refs for stage-internal handoff
airflow.reject: small task metadata becoming artifact body, memory body, study truth, or publication verdict

aws_step_functions.adopt: idempotent execution identity and explicit redrive boundary
aws_step_functions.reject: transport idempotency replacing owner receipt or typed blocker

durable_functions.adopt: deterministic orchestration constraints for replayable route/control-plane logic
durable_functions.reject: open-ended LLM medical judgment or non-idempotent artifact mutation inside deterministic orchestration

openlineage.adopt: run, job, dataset, and facet refs for provenance correlation
openlineage.reject: lineage proving medical validity, quality closure, or publication readiness

opentelemetry.reject: observability traces closing quality gate or publication verdict

codex_executor_frontdoor_policy.ordinary_executor_route: MAS/OPL-governed recovery route uses a MAS owner callable, MAS domain-handler dispatch, or OPL StageRun provider attempt that may invoke Codex as an internal executor
manual_foreground_route_requirements: user explicitly selects foreground/manual editing or fast-lane mode
agent labels the output as manual foreground work, not MAS/OPL-governed recovery
agent avoids runtime-owned study truth, OPL queue/attempt artifacts, publication_eval/latest.json, and controller_decisions/latest.json unless a separate MAS owner surface authorizes those writes
agent states which workspace surfaces were edited and which MAS/OPL truth surfaces were not updated
subsequent MAS/OPL recovery claim requires intake, owner receipt, quality gate receipt, typed blocker, human gate, route-back evidence, strict running proof, or consumed canonical changed surface ref

recent_non_authoritative_samples.purpose: debug context only; not acceptance truth
